title: Hoplite+
body:
Hoplite+ is an unofficial modpack for [Hoplite](https://hoplite.gg/).

**DISCLAMER: I AM NOT AFFILIATED WITH THE HOPLITE TEAM. THIS IS NOT THE OFFICIAL MODPACK, WHICH YOU CAN GET FROM THEIR WEBSITE**

Hoplite+ is a QoL modpack which includes features for the Hoplite server. Currently, there are very few Hoplite targeted mods, but as more are made, this modpack will grow.
